items.name: &cAlarm
lore: &7Right-click to cycle: off -> alert -> panic -> off

items.name: &7Grindstone
lore: &7Mounts on a container and grinds its contents when powered
&7Powered from the top; grinds faster with more power; outputs below

items.name: &fFan
lore: &7Pushes mobs, players & items away from its mount
&7Stronger with more surplus power; fixed range

items.name: &fLarge Banner
lore: &7Place a banner in the center, surround with wool.
